raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California community college students are experiencing hunger and homelessness at alarming rates.",
    "Each community college campus is required to establish a basic needs center by July 1, 2022.",
    "The basic needs coordinator will provide a single point of contact for students to access basic needs services.",
    "The establishment of basic needs centers and coordinators aims to link students to on- and off-campus housing, food, mental health, and other basic needs services.",
    "Access to consistent food and housing is critical for achieving educational equity goals.",
    "Students lacking basic resources such as food and housing are unable to prioritize academic progress.",
    "Basic needs centers will empower student success in higher education."
  ]
}
```
